hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '^src/strategies/[^/]+\.py$|^src/utils/indicators\.py$' && printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"REMINDER: You just modified a strategy or indicator file (%s). Review docs/USER_GUIDE.md section 14 (Trading Terminology) — if you added a new strategy, add it to the strategies table and note which indicators it uses; if you added a new indicator, add it to the Indicators table."}}\n' "$FILE" || true
